query.query_string: Sodium sulfate AND dry eye syndrome

data.query: Sodium sulfate AND dry eye syndrome

results.title: A decrease in the tear secretion volume in a mouse model with ulcerative colitis.
results.abstract: Dry eye syndrome is known to develop from several systemic inflammatory diseases. Although dry eye may develop due to extraintestinal complications of ulcerative colitis (UC), the pathogenesis is not well-known. This study aimed to investigate whether there was decrease in the tear secretion volume in a mice model with UC; the difference between the control and dextran sodium sulphate (DSS)-treated group was also determined.
